title: PUT /api/weight/{id} — update weight entry value
description: Implement the endpoint to update the weight_value of an existing entry. The date cannot be changed.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /api/weight/{id} with valid weight_value returns 200 with updated entry
Only the weight_value is updated — recorded_at cannot be changed
Returns 404 if entry does not exist
Returns 403 if entry belongs to a different user
weight_value must be positive — zero or negative returns 422
Returns 401 if no valid JWT provided

steps.details: In src/api/schemas/weight.py, add UpdateWeightRequest(BaseModel) with: weight_value (float, gt=0).

In src/api/routers/weight.py, add PUT /{entry_id} route. Handler: query db for WeightEntry with entry_id, if not found raise HTTPException(404, 'Entry not found'), if entry.user_id != current_user.id raise HTTPException(403, 'Not authorized'), update entry.weight_value = request.weight_value, commit, refresh, return WeightEntryResponse.

Create a weight entry, then PUT /api/weight/{id} with {"weight_value": 190.0}. Verify: status 200, weight_value updated, recorded_at unchanged. Try updating another user's entry — verify 403. Try updating non-existent id — verify 404.

technicalNotes: Check user ownership before updating to prevent unauthorized modifications
Return 403 (not 404) when entry exists but belongs to another user — this prevents exposing whether the entry exists
